[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-04-12
[TITLE]: Celebrities react to Britney Spears pregnancy, including Paris Hilton and Jamie Lynn Spears
[METADATA/INTRO]: Celebrities are sharing their love and appreciation for Britney Spears, including her longtime friend Paris Hilton, following her pregnancy announcement on Monday, revealing she is expecting her third child. “So happy for you sis! You are an incredible mother and...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Michelle Visage, judge of ‘RuPaul’s Drag Race,’ wrote “THRILLED for you and Sam, Britney!” and singer Chloe Bailey commented “congratulations.” 
 And while friends and fans of the artist congratulated Britney for the baby news, her estranged sister Jamie Lynn Spears quietly liked the post without a comment, showing her support for the announcement. 
 Paris has been one of Britney’s most supportive friends, previously discussing the difficult situations she faced during her 13-year conservatorship. “She’s built a huge empire,” the heiress said, “She’s a legend, she’s an icon, she’s a mother. She’s amazing and she has these people controlling her money, her life. So not fair but I’m so proud of her for speaking up and using her voice.”

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Why Paris Hilton Says She & Britney Spears "Created the Selfie"
[METADATA/INTRO]: There is nothing simple about Paris Hilton and Britney Spears' influence during the mid-aughts. In fact, the heiress reminisced about one of their outings, sharing a slew of selfie-style snaps with the "Toxic" singer from 2006. And as Paris maintained,...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: There is nothing simple about Paris Hilton and Britney Spears' influence during the mid-aughts. 
 In fact, the heiress reminisced about one of their outings, sharing a slew of selfie-style snaps with the "Toxic" singer from 2006. And as Paris maintained, the photos capture more than just pop culture history. 
 "17 years ago, Britney and I created the selfie!," she captioned the Nov. 19 post. "Tag me in your most epic selfies to celebrate the most iconic invention." 
 The snaps show Paris and Britney posing with their heads together and smiling for the camera. The last slide captured the friends giving attitude while making kissy faces.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2020-09-22
[TITLE]: Britney Spears featured in new ABC '20/20' special '$ellebrity: The Go-To Girls' – MOViN 92.5
[METADATA/INTRO]: Remember back in the early 2000s, you couldn’t open a magazine or click on a website without reading about the exploits of Britney Spears — with or without her frequent party pal Paris Hilton? Those two stars, along with Kim...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Remember back in the early 2000s, you couldn’t open a magazine or click on a website without reading about the exploits of Britney Spears — with or without her frequent party pal Paris Hilton? Those two stars, along with Kim Kardashian West, are the subject of a special edition of ABC’s 20/20 this weekend. 
 Called $ellebrity: The Go-To Girls, the special will explore how those three women “changed Hollywood’s fame game,” and “paved the way for a whole new era of celebrity.” It was a time where Britney became more famous for her marriages and forgetting to wear underwear than for her music, while Paris and Kim somehow turned appearing in a sex tape into a viable career option.
